@803200-812120 '[Maison Asrar Regent] if you like fragrances like Bvlgari Tiger or... some of the Louis Vuitton fragrances Afternoon Swim, Imagination, stuff like that, then you're going to really enjoy this'

integrity_receipt_astroturfing.note: REVIEW-MANIPULATION called out on-screen: Nusuk Gladius 'is very very stupid good, but it is heavily Astro turfed. Like to an extent I don't think I have ever seen before in my entire life... Fragrantica... a 4.93 out of 5. 135 votes and 131 of those loved the fragrance... that is very suspicious... brands — and I'm not talking just Middle Eastern, I'm talking designer, niche, indie, the whole 9 yards — have discovered that they can make their stuff rated a little higher... expect to see more insanity like that as time goes' @357640-426960 — manufactured public review signal named in the wild; creator separates his own read ('is it really good? Yes') from the polluted rating
